name: 36th-storm-corps-portal-server
description: Backend for the 36th Storm Corps portal with local login, optional Google OAuth, RBAC, and forum APIs.

scripts.health-check: node -e "fetch('http://localhost:3000/health').then(async (res) => { const body = await res.json(); console.log(JSON.stringify({ status: res.status, body }, null, 2)); }).catch((error) => { console.error(error); process.exit(1); })"
